description_long: This is a stylized doll figure with a large, blocky head and a simplified, cartoonish body. The doll's arms are outstretched to the sides, and its legs are fused together, giving it a static, upright posture. The surface appears uniformly white and matte, with no visible facial features, clothing details, or color accents. The overall form is geometric and low in detail, suggesting a minimalist or prototype design. The doll's proportions are exaggerated, with a head much larger than the body, reminiscent of certain collectible vinyl toys. There are no visible joints, seams, or movable parts, and the figure stands on a flat, stable base.
description: A minimalist, white doll with a large head, outstretched arms, and a simplified, featureless body. The figure is geometric and stands upright on a flat base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large, flat-topped head, outstretched arms, and fused legs, with no facial features or clothing details visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the protruding head and nose, the arm extending outward, and the flatness of the body and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, arms, and legs, all featureless and smooth, emphasizing the doll's simple geometry.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the head's profile, arm, and the continuous, unbroken surface of the body.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll appears to be wearing a simple, short-sleeved shirt and pants, all rendered in a single, untextured white color with no visible patterns or fashion influences.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended outward horizontally, legs together, and head facing forward. The posture is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are visible; the face is completely smooth and featureless.
attribute_hair_style: No hair is visible; the head is smooth and unadorned.
